programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Down to you
programme.desc: Al and Imogen begin a romantic journey where true love often competes with the temptation to stray from commitment.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.title: A Christmas Story Christmas
programme.desc: Sequel to annual holiday favorite, “A Christmas Story.” Ralphie is all grown up and must deal with Christmas and all that comes with it…as a dad.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: The Curse of the Necklace
programme.desc: When Laura Davis is gifted an antique necklace, her daughters uncover a sinister force hidden within that threatens to destroy everything they love.

programme.title: The Fallout
programme.desc: High schooler Vada navigates the emotional fallout she experiences in the wake of a school tragedy.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the teenage son of his new crime boss after fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong.

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: 5 days before the statute of limitations of a 15-year-old kidnapping case expires, a flower is left anonymously at the original crime scene. A few days later, a similar kidnapping takes place.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep15
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Finale
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Single in Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho is a famous influencer who praises living a single life. Hyeon-Jin is an editor who is desperate about finding her partner. The two meets while working together for a book.

programme.title: Hidden Face
programme.desc: While Sung-jin is searching for his fiancée Su-yeon, he meets her friend Mi-ju. A breathtaking thriller unfolds in which Su-yeon, who is trapped in a secret room, witnesses a naked truth.

programme.title: My Puppy
programme.desc: A groom-to-be sets off with his friend to finding a new owner for his puppy.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A radio DJ receives a letter written 23 years ago. Through the letter, the story of his first love and friendships of five friends are revealed.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Kang-soo was falsely accused and imprisoned. A prosecutor offered him a deal to be a snitch in exchange for a reduced sentence and Kang-soo starts to shake up the drug investigation...

programme.title: You Will Die in 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun-woo tells Jung-yoon that she'll be stabbed to death in 6 hours. She doubts his words but still wants to find out the truth. She later realizes he is related to serial killings...

programme.title: Where Would You Like to Go?
programme.desc: A tragic accident claims the lives of a teacher. His widow seeks solace in a trip to Warsaw, where an unexpected reunion and a letter bring hope to her journey of healing and rediscovery.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates South Korea’s largest crime organization and spends eight years rising in the ranks. When the head of the organization is killed, he becomes torn between his loyalties.

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep1
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep2
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Worst Woman
programme.desc: Eun-hee is an actress with poor acting and she acts in her life. She creates different characters when she dates a man. Eventually, her lies are tangled up and everything is messed up...

programme.title: Love 911
programme.desc: A doctor tries to woo a grieving, widowed firefighter in her attempt to get him to testify on her behalf in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After pushing a broom for centuries, Merlin's apprentice, Douxie, springs into action when the great sorcerer asks him to find the Guardians of Arcadia.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Douxie, Claire, Steve and Jim meet the legendary King Arthur and his sister, Morgana, in medieval Camelot — where being a troll is punishable by death.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Tensions run high within team Voltron as they discuss Lotor’s fate and try to figure out their next move

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and Thunk challenge each other in the first-ever dare-off, Thunk faces the deep end - his greatest fear; Grug picks a fight with the moon.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When snobby neighbors move in next door and complain about a bone pile blocking their backyard view, The Croods launch into the first-ever prank war.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Mysteries collide when horse thieves strike Miradero at the same time as a pie thief strikes the church bake sale while the adults try to keep the horse thieves at bay Lucky is determined to find out who stole the pies.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Luckys buttons are pushed when her seemingly perfect cousin Julian comes to visit but reveals himself to be a junior con man

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the crew is forced to spend a night in the desert to avoid a sandstorm, they wake up the next day without their most important parts.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 2500 Candles for Ra Upset that no one remembered his birthday, Ra goes to hang out with the mummies at the Deedstown museum. It's a Mad, Mad, Mad Underworld When Casper finds Cappy's old treasure map, he promises to help the pirate find his lost fortune.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Curse of the Sandwich After Ra accidentally bites into Thatch's sandwich, he becomes convinced that he's turning into a vampire. Real Little Monster When Norman the bully comes after Jimmy, Casper helps his human friend hide in the one place he knows Norman won't look—Scare School.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Bill and Edward set off to look for butterflies in the wood. In particular they hope to see the rare Polka Dot Butterfly. On the way, they meet a Butterfly Collector who is also looking for the Polka Dot but - instead of just enjoying watching the butterfly - he wants to catch it in his net and keep it in a jar. The friends see it as their mission to protect the Polka Dot and let it fly free.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert pedals his car to meet Bill and Ping Pong at the tree house where they plan to spend the night. On his way he meets Raggety who is very proud of the new lantern he has made from glowing bugs he found in the forest. Rupert invites him to sleep at the tree house but Raggety announces he is a big brave elf and wants to sleep by himself. At the tree house, Bill has a surprise for Rupert. Astra the Star Girl has come to Nutwood, but sadly she has not come to play. She dropped some new stars while she was hanging them in the sky. They have fallen down to Earth and she has followed them to Nutwood. She has to get them back in the sky before nightfall or they will miss their first moonlight and fade away forever. Ping Pong magics Rupert's car into a flying car to assist their search but there are lots of shiny things in Nutwood sending them on false trails. Evening approaches and time is running out. Meanwhile, Raggety prepares for his night alone, and discovers the glowing bugs in his lantern can talk.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When a meteorite crashes into the Penthouse, Sherman transforms into a superhero and things go from bad to worse when Hobson turns into a supervillain

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman leaves a mess in the Penthouse, he and Peabody find a mouse and must catch it before it completely wrecks the show

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the others debate how to keep the dragons a secret, even as a rambunctious young “cloaking” dragon gets loose in town and pursues a friendship with a reluctant Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the Riders try to save ICARIS when it’s revealed to be in danger from a monstrous dragon.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Masikura convinces King Julien that the island is sinking, Julien believes building an ark is the only way to save his people

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When the Jungle Rooster keeps him up at night, Julien discovers that the Foosa have been farming chickens for food and risks his life to free them all

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat and Puss journey underground in search of treasure and discovery a kingdom of moles led by a rather bizarre king.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: To prove he's a ladies' man, Puss rescues a mermaid, who instantly falls in love with him … and becomes his worst nightmare

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector – the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: The Crood and Betterman parents have been struggling to get along – they’re so different! The two couple realize they need some time apart and decide to get away from the farm and each other. Too bad both couples choose to take a break on the same, small beach.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: While the parents are away, the kids are in charge of the tree house, but when the punch monkeys invade the house, the kids find themselves out of their element.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Jealous of the Thunder Sisters, the men on the farm undergo a series of difficult initiation rituals to try and join the exclusive tribe of women.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small- scale taxi business

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent force the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders go in search of Thunder and must face a gauntlet of dangerous dragons to find their lost friend. Along the way, Tom reveals his big secret to D’Angelo and Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders help Thunder, who is seeking revenge against the dragons that chased off his family.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom hatches an unorthodox plan to use a monstrous Nightmare to test Alex’s new fire suits that endangers the secret of dragons.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team is reunited, but now they must race against the clock to stop Dann from setting off an explosion that will melt the polar ice caps and send the world into a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Three months after their battle in the arctic, the team is back in L.A. with one major change: they’ve been fired as Spy Racers! Most of the team is able to easily readjust to civilian life: Frostee is trying to get his license and Layla is a professional stunt driver in the biggest movie franchise in the world. But Tony can’t rest; his gut is telling him that Dann is still out there and is plotting to destroy L.A. and he’ll stop at nothing to prove it.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony was right; Dann is back and she’s been spotted all around Los Angeles! The Spy Racers get back together on an unofficial mission to bring her down! Meanwhile, Ms. Nowhere, Palindrome and Roscoe run their out bounty hunter operation.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Painfully Delicious!
programme.desc: Three chefs, joined by their manager and assistant, travel to Hong Kong for inspiration. In this cultural crossroads, they meet remarkable people, discover new stories, and create fresh “recipes for life".

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Rented in Finland
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: Six Singles Under One Roof
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: Stage Fighter
programme.desc: Stage Fighter is a survival program for male dancers to compete in ballet, modern dance and Korean traditional dance genres. They will present spectacular performances with unique style.

programme.desc: Based on webtoon, the series follows a woman who goes on a blind date, meets two charming guys, and navigates her feelings to discover true love.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Bill and Edward set off to look for butterflies in the wood. In particular they hope to see the rare Polka Dot Butterfly. On the way, they meet a Butterfly Collector who is also looking for the Polka Dot but - instead of just enjoying watching the butterfly - he wants to catch it in his net and keep it in a jar. The friends see it as their mission to protect the Polka Dot and let it fly free.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert pedals his car to meet Bill and Ping Pong at the tree house where they plan to spend the night. On his way he meets Raggety who is very proud of the new lantern he has made from glowing bugs he found in the forest. Rupert invites him to sleep at the tree house but Raggety announces he is a big brave elf and wants to sleep by himself. At the tree house, Bill has a surprise for Rupert. Astra the Star Girl has come to Nutwood, but sadly she has not come to play. She dropped some new stars while she was hanging them in the sky. They have fallen down to Earth and she has followed them to Nutwood. She has to get them back in the sky before nightfall or they will miss their first moonlight and fade away forever. Ping Pong magics Rupert's car into a flying car to assist their search but there are lots of shiny things in Nutwood sending them on false trails. Evening approaches and time is running out. Meanwhile, Raggety prepares for his night alone, and discovers the glowing bugs in his lantern can talk.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When a meteorite crashes into the Penthouse, Sherman transforms into a superhero and things go from bad to worse when Hobson turns into a supervillain

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman leaves a mess in the Penthouse, he and Peabody find a mouse and must catch it before it completely wrecks the show

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the others debate how to keep the dragons a secret, even as a rambunctious young “cloaking” dragon gets loose in town and pursues a friendship with a reluctant Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the Riders try to save ICARIS when it’s revealed to be in danger from a monstrous dragon.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Masikura convinces King Julien that the island is sinking, Julien believes building an ark is the only way to save his people

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When the Jungle Rooster keeps him up at night, Julien discovers that the Foosa have been farming chickens for food and risks his life to free them all

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat and Puss journey underground in search of treasure and discovery a kingdom of moles led by a rather bizarre king.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: To prove he's a ladies' man, Puss rescues a mermaid, who instantly falls in love with him … and becomes his worst nightmare

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector – the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: The Crood and Betterman parents have been struggling to get along – they’re so different! The two couple realize they need some time apart and decide to get away from the farm and each other. Too bad both couples choose to take a break on the same, small beach.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: While the parents are away, the kids are in charge of the tree house, but when the punch monkeys invade the house, the kids find themselves out of their element.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Jealous of the Thunder Sisters, the men on the farm undergo a series of difficult initiation rituals to try and join the exclusive tribe of women.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small- scale taxi business

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent force the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders go in search of Thunder and must face a gauntlet of dangerous dragons to find their lost friend. Along the way, Tom reveals his big secret to D’Angelo and Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders help Thunder, who is seeking revenge against the dragons that chased off his family.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom hatches an unorthodox plan to use a monstrous Nightmare to test Alex’s new fire suits that endangers the secret of dragons.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team is reunited, but now they must race against the clock to stop Dann from setting off an explosion that will melt the polar ice caps and send the world into a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Three months after their battle in the arctic, the team is back in L.A. with one major change: they’ve been fired as Spy Racers! Most of the team is able to easily readjust to civilian life: Frostee is trying to get his license and Layla is a professional stunt driver in the biggest movie franchise in the world. But Tony can’t rest; his gut is telling him that Dann is still out there and is plotting to destroy L.A. and he’ll stop at nothing to prove it.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony was right; Dann is back and she’s been spotted all around Los Angeles! The Spy Racers get back together on an unofficial mission to bring her down! Meanwhile, Ms. Nowhere, Palindrome and Roscoe run their out bounty hunter operation.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister’s place in the games.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq 1
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she’s ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards’ former family home. She’s determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: The Seasons
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Masters: Born to Run!
programme.desc: Masters: Born to Run!

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Angela has a huge growth on the back of her neck that she fears will ruin her daughter's wedding. Loretta is terrified that her oozing skin condition will get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Living with my Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: My Husband's Other Wife
programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he’s faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make an Israeli-inspired, tahini-based yoghurt sauce with harissa, served over charred chicken and family-style pitta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: These cooking methods have aged like a fine. Join host Michael Yo for a history lesson in five culinary customs, from Mayan meat-smoking to steaming fish with heat from ancient hot springs.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: Five men set out on an eco-journey to Mongolia: leader Kim Seok-hoon, Kwon Yul, Lim Woo-il, Shin Jae-ha and nomad Shaun. With only backpacks, they have a shared mission to 'clean the Earth'.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)

programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he’s faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: Eden moves to Nashville and gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with Jax, the son of a wealthy power player in the country-music scene. But things take a turn when other women turn up dead.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Josh Niland, the fish king, surprises all the contestants when he unveils perfectly butchered cuts of beef. He then leads the kitchen in a masterclass on how to butcher a tuna to represent beef cuts.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: MasterChef welcomes esteemed author and Yotam Ottolenghi protégé Ixta Belfrage for a debut visit that packs a punch. The British chef has brought a Mystery Box bursting with her favourite produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Today’s pressure test raises the bar, as the contestants are tasked with recreating guest chef Blayne Bertoncello’s highly technical dessert, not just once, but in five consistent dishes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: It's make-your-own-takeout night and Rachael teaches us how to create her version of Khua Kling, a Thai stir-fry dish with ground beef, lime leaf and red curry paste, served with short-grain rice.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Angela has a huge growth on the back of her neck that she fears will ruin her daughter's wedding. Loretta is terrified that her oozing skin condition will get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today's homes will focus on "Home Interiors for Families," reflecting the rising popularity of family-orientated designs. We'll be sharing many tips that bring small but certain happiness to your home.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.desc: Rachael is a caretaker whose arm bump interferes with helping her disabled bestie. Medical student Gili assists Dr. Lee with Christian's painful back bump as his stuffed-animal companion watches.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show
programme.desc: Philanthropist and financier David Rubenstein uncovers inside stories from the most influential minds in business.

programme.title: Best of the Bloomberg Women, Money & Power Event
programme.desc: Highlights of the event which brings together the most influential female voices in finance from around the world to discuss the biggest themes facing the future of business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: Technology that once seemed like science fiction is rapidly becoming reality, transforming our existence. Emily Chang unravels the future of being human in an age of unprecedented innovation.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks to chief executives and other industry leaders about what drives them and how they navigate and shape their companies amid significant change.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: A fast-paced, dynamic series that lives at the intersection of culture, tech, entertainment, and business. Hosted by high-profile journalist Emily Chang.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Focusing on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Hosted by Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Ramen Japan
programme.desc: Enjoy Nagoya's fiery ramen, inspired by the city's one-of-a-kind food culture! Discover these unique local ramens!

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: In summer, children gather at the street corners where Jizo statues stand for lively festivities. People pray for the health and success of their children during this cornerstone of faith.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Today: adjusting a schedule with a client. Lan Cheng, from China, works in Gunma Prefecture at a company that makes pizza ovens. He'd like to learn how to better communicate with customers.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Potters Matsubara Emi and Matsushita Ryohei use waste from their island home, bean pods, seashells, and even animal bones, in their work. A deep respect for the island helps them convey its beauty.

programme.title: Lot 1000: The Place and the People
programme.desc: Redevelopment plans mean that the last building in Lot 1000 in central Sapporo must be demolished. We learn about the past, present, and future of this spot, exploring its centuries-long history.

programme.title: Anpan is Joy
programme.desc: A single bite of anpan, bread filled with sweet bean paste, is sheer joy. Born at the end of the samurai era, it has over 150 years of history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Mt.Fuji's Climb to World Heritage
programme.desc: Mt. Fuji's bid for World Heritage faced formidable obstacles, including devastation that would shock any mountain climber. This is the story of Fuji's long climb to celebrated cultural treasure.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: Ultra-thin noodles and amber broth: the story of a people who overcame disaster and their favorite bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: The spotlight's on That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime. Creator Fuse makes his TV debut to discuss the story's origins, and we visit the anime production to learn about the creative process.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on hair dryers, "Become an Athlete for three minutes," with karate exercises, and a music performance, "Plants Song." It energizes kids.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: There are about 900 service areas along Japan's expressways. Some feature aquariums, amusement parks, or hot spring baths. They continue to evolve, fulfilling a growing variety of functions.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Yufuin District is known for hot springs. Meme lives at a temple and loves to sunbathe with the chief priest. Mari likes to relax in baskets or on top of manhole covers. Fuku lives at a sake brewery.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Data centers, the engines of our digital age, consume vast energy and drive a surge in CO2 emissions, intensifying climate risks while powering global connectivity.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Miyamae Yoshiyuki (Fashion designer) visits Kochi. Kochi's Sunday market features around 500 stalls with fixed locations. Miyamae contemplates how communication has contributed to its longevity.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: In Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire, the Spengler family returns to where it all started - the iconic New York City firehouse - to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who’ve developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an army of ghosts that casts a death chill upon the city, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: Singapore Hour
programme.desc: We uncover alcohol-free nightlife, chase Chingay-inspired treats, meet the Tanzanian family who calls Singapore home, and follow driverless buses shaping tomorrow’s commute.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: 3AM - The Hospital
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a young woman tries to end a controlling relationship, her former boyfriend carries out a brazen, public attack—forcing a community to confront the deadly consequences of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: Tara Grinstead's sudden disappearance goes unexplained for 11 years until a surprising statement to law enforcement from Bo Dukes, a former student, names his friend and former classmate as her killer.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1)
programme.desc: The Royal Malaysia Police and the Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency work together to search for survivors and bodies of the victims in the Banting boat disaster over 36 hours.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1)
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Two teens under interrogation turn on each other; a suspect attempts a shocking escape from police custody; a husband and wife must answer for their deadly secret; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A farmer shares a terrible secret about two missing people—and her pigs; a confrontation over a parking space turns deadly; a missing person case takes a dark turn; and more.
